description.value:
A tarnished coin stamped with the ember-mark â€” a seven-pointed flame. The metal is warm to the touch even in the deepest cold. It should not be in a common graveyard.

Effect: While you carry this coin, you can sense the presence of undead creatures within 3 squares â€” a faint warmth pulses from the coin when undead are near. Additionally, once per encounter, when you are targeted by a fear or charm effect from an undead creature, you can use a triggered action to immediately end the effect on you. The coin flares with amber light as the undead recoils.

If you hold the coin aloft and speak the words "By the Ember's light, return to your rest" as a maneuver, make an easy Presence test. On a success, each undead minion within 2 squares is destroyed. This ability can be used once per encounter.
description.director: Found: Beat 2 â€” The Graveyard. Discovered on the Barrow-Warden's body. A medium Reason test identifies it as an Ember-Keeper's token. Kaelen will recognise this coin in Beat 7 â€” it belonged to a Keeper who was murdered before she left the order.

project.prerequisites: A cold-iron blank, ash from an Ever-Ember, the name of a dead Keeper spoken aloud at midnight
project.source: Ember-Keeper liturgical texts in Old NorrÅ“nt
